```{r}
      labs(title = "Top isoform-switch genes", x = NULL, y = "Switch priority", fill = "Max |dIF|") +
      theme_rnaseq_minimal()
    save_plot_versions(isoform_gene_plot, step10_isoform_plot_path("15_45_isoform_switch_gene_ranking.pdf"), width = 8.5, height = 6)
  }

  if (nrow(isoform_switch_isoforms) > 0) {
    isoform_scatter <- isoform_switch_isoforms %>%
      mutate(
        isoform_switch_q_value = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(isoform_switch_q_value)),
        dIF_value = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dIF_value)),
        significant = ifelse(is.finite(isoform_switch_q_value) & isoform_switch_q_value < 0.05 & is.finite(dIF_value) & abs(dIF_value) >= 0.1, "significant", "ns")
      ) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = dIF_value, y = -log10(isoform_switch_q_value + 1e-300), color = significant)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1.3) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed") +
      geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.1, 0.1), linetype = "dashed") +
      scale_color_manual(values = viz_pal$sig_status) +
      labs(title = "Isoform switch significance landscape", x = "dIF", y = "-log10(switch q-value)") +
      theme_rnaseq_bw()
    save_plot_versions(isoform_scatter, step10_isoform_plot_path("15_46_isoform_switch_isoform_scatter.pdf"), width = 8.5, height = 6)
  }

  if (nrow(isoform_fraction_df) > 0) {
    sample_cols <- intersect(colnames(isoform_fraction_df), colnames(gene_exp))
    id_col <- intersect(c("isoform_id", "iso_ref", "isoformID"), colnames(isoform_fraction_df))[1]
    gene_label_col <- intersect(c("gene_name", "gene_label"), colnames(isoform_fraction_df))[1]
    if (length(sample_cols) >= 4 && !is.na(id_col)) {
      top_isoforms <- isoform_switch_isoforms %>%
        arrange(isoform_switch_q_value, desc(abs(dIF_value))) %>%
        distinct(isoform_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
        slice_head(n = 20) %>%
        pull(isoform_id)
      heat_df <- isoform_fraction_df %>%
        filter(.data[[id_col]] %in% top_isoforms)
      if (nrow(heat_df) >= 2) {
        heat_mat <- as.matrix(heat_df[, sample_cols, drop = FALSE])
        heat_mat <- safe_scale_rows(heat_mat)
        row_labels <- heat_df[[id_col]]
        if (!is.na(gene_label_col)) {
          row_labels <- paste0(dplyr::coalesce(heat_df[[gene_label_col]], heat_df[[id_col]]), " | ", heat_df[[id_col]])
        }
        rownames(heat_mat) <- row_labels
        save_base_pdf_versions(
          primary = step10_isoform_plot_path("15_47_isoform_fraction_heatmap.pdf"),
          width = 9,
          height = 10,
          expr = ComplexHeatmap::draw(
            ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(
              heat_mat,
              name = "z-score",
              col = heatmap_diverging_col_fun(heat_mat),
              top_annotation = heatmap_group_annotation(sample_info$group),
              cluster_rows = TRUE,
              cluster_columns = TRUE,
              column_names_rot = 45
            )
          )
        )
      }
    }
  }

  isoform_summary_tbl <- data.frame(
    metric = c("switch_genes", "switch_isoforms", "genes_with_pair_summary"),
    count = c(nrow(isoform_switch_genes), nrow(isoform_switch_isoforms), nrow(isoform_switch_pairs)),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  write.csv(isoform_summary_tbl, step10_isoform_table_path("15_48_isoform_switch_summary_table.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  isoform_summary_plot <- ggplot(isoform_summary_tbl, aes(x = metric, y = count, fill = metric)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = resolve_named_colors(viz_pal$accent, isoform_summary_tbl$metric)) +
    labs(title = "Isoform switch summary", x = NULL, y = "Count") +
    theme_rnaseq_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
  save_plot_versions(isoform_summary_plot, step10_isoform_plot_path("15_48_isoform_switch_summary_barplot.pdf"), width = 7.5, height = 4.5)

  consequence_plot_tbl <- data.frame()
  if (nrow(isoform_switch_pairs) > 0 && "consequence_types" %in% colnames(isoform_switch_pairs)) {
    consequence_plot_tbl <- isoform_switch_pairs %>%
      tidyr::separate_rows(consequence_types, sep = ";") %>%
      filter(!is.na(consequence_types), consequence_types != "") %>%
      count(consequence_types, name = "count") %>%
      arrange(desc(count))
  } else if (nrow(isoform_consequence_summary) > 0) {
    char_cols <- names(isoform_consequence_summary)[vapply(isoform_consequence_summary, is.character, logical(1))]
    num_cols <- names(isoform_consequence_summary)[vapply(isoform_consequence_summary, is.numeric, logical(1))]
    if (length(char_cols) >= 1 && length(num_cols) >= 1) {
      consequence_plot_tbl <- isoform_consequence_summary %>%
        transmute(consequence_types = .data[[char_cols[1]]], count = .data[[num_cols[1]]]) %>%
        filter(!is.na(consequence_types), consequence_types != "", is.finite(count))
    }
  }

  if (nrow(consequence_plot_tbl) > 0) {
    consequence_plot_tbl <- consequence_plot_tbl %>%
      arrange(desc(count)) %>%
      slice_head(n = 15) %>%
      mutate(consequence_types = factor(consequence_types, levels = rev(unique(consequence_types))))
    consequence_plot <- ggplot(consequence_plot_tbl, aes(x = consequence_types, y = count, fill = count)) +
      geom_col(width = 0.75) +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_fill_heatmap_sequential() +
      labs(title = "Isoform switch consequence summary", x = NULL, y = "Count") +
      theme_rnaseq_minimal() +
      theme(legend.position = "none")
    save_plot_versions(consequence_plot, step10_isoform_plot_path("15_49_isoform_consequence_summary_barplot.pdf"), width = 8.5, height = 6)
  }
}
```

## 15.8 module-DAS 整合

```{r}
if (nrow(as_gene_priority) > 0 && nrow(module_df_annotated) > 0) {
  gene_priority_tbl <- as_gene_priority %>%
    left_join(
      module_df_annotated %>%
        dplyr::select(gene_id, ensembl_id, module_label, gene_label, ENTREZID) %>%
        distinct(ensembl_id, .keep_all = TRUE),
      by = c("gene_id_clean" = "ensembl_id"),
      suffix = c("", "_module")
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      ensembl_id_final = gene_id_clean,
      de_id_final = gene_id,
      SYMBOL_final = dplyr::coalesce(gene_label, gene_label_module, gene_id_clean),
      ENTREZID_final = ENTREZID
    )

  module_universe_ids <- unique(module_df_annotated$gene_id)
  das_ids_in_universe <- unique(module_df_annotated$gene_id[module_df_annotated$ensembl_id %in% gene_priority_tbl$ensembl_id_final])

  if (length(das_ids_in_universe) > 0 && nrow(module_trait_tbl) > 0) {
    das_module_enrichment <- bind_rows(lapply(sort(unique(module_df_annotated$module_label)), function(one_module) {
      module_genes <- unique(module_df_annotated$gene_id[module_df_annotated$module_label == one_module])
      in_module_das <- sum(module_genes %in% das_ids_in_universe)
      in_module_non_das <- length(module_genes) - in_module_das
      out_module_das <- length(das_ids_in_universe) - in_module_das
      out_module_non_das <- length(module_universe_ids) - length(module_genes) - out_module_das
      fisher_res <- fisher.test(matrix(c(in_module_das, in_module_non_das, out_module_das, out_module_non_das), nrow = 2), alternative = "greater")
      bg_ratio <- length(das_ids_in_universe) / length(module_universe_ids)
      module_ratio <- if (length(module_genes) > 0) in_module_das / length(module_genes) else 0
      data.frame(
        Module = one_module,
        module_size = length(module_genes),
        das_gene_count = in_module_das,
        das_gene_ratio = module_ratio,
        background_ratio = bg_ratio,
        fold_enrichment = ifelse(bg_ratio > 0, module_ratio / bg_ratio, NA_real_),
        odds_ratio = unname(fisher_res$estimate),
        pvalue = fisher_res$p.value,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    })) %>%
      left_join(
        module_trait_tbl %>%
          dplyr::select(Module, module_trait_correlation = correlation, module_trait_pvalue = pvalue),
        by = "Module"
      ) %>%
      arrange(pvalue, desc(fold_enrichment))

    write.csv(das_module_enrichment, step10_integr_table_path("15_24_DAS_module_enrichment.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
    das_module_plot <- ggplot(das_module_enrichment, aes(x = module_trait_correlation, y = reorder(Module, module_trait_correlation), size = das_gene_count, color = -log10(pvalue + 1e-300))) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.9) +
      scale_color_heatmap_sequential() +
      labs(title = "DAS 与共表达模块整合", x = "Module-trait correlation", y = NULL, size = "DAS genes", color = "-log10(pvalue)") +
      theme_rnaseq_bw()
    save_plot_versions(
      das_module_plot,
      primary = step10_integr_plot_path("15_25_DAS_module_enrichment_bubble.pdf"),
      width = 8.5,
      height = max(4.5, 0.8 * nrow(das_module_enrichment))
    )
  }

  if (nrow(rmats_sig) > 0) {
    preferred_sig_events <- rmats_sig %>%
      filter(count_mode == preferred_count_mode) %>%
      arrange(event_pvalue, desc(abs_delta_psi))

    event_type_burden <- preferred_sig_events %>%
      group_by(gene_label, event_type) %>%
      summarise(event_count = n(), .groups = "drop")

    top_burden_genes <- gene_priority_tbl %>%
      arrange(desc(significant_event_count), best_event_pvalue) %>%
      slice_head(n = 30) %>%
      pull(SYMBOL_final)

    event_type_burden_mat <- event_type_burden %>%
      filter(gene_label %in% top_burden_genes) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = event_type, values_from = event_count, values_fill = 0) %>%
      as.data.frame()

    if (nrow(event_type_burden_mat) >= 2) {
      rownames(event_type_burden_mat) <- event_type_burden_mat$gene_label
      event_type_burden_mat$gene_label <- NULL
      event_burden_max <- max(event_type_burden_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
      event_burden_breaks <- if (is.finite(event_burden_max) && event_burden_max > 1) {
        c(0, floor(event_burden_max / 2), event_burden_max)
      } else {
        c(0, 0.5, 1)
      }
      save_base_pdf_versions(
        primary = step10_integr_plot_path("15_26_DAS_gene_eventtype_heatmap.pdf"),
        width = 7.5,
        height = 9,
        expr = ComplexHeatmap::draw(
          ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(
            as.matrix(event_type_burden_mat),
            name = "Events",
            col = heatmap_sequential_col_fun(breaks = event_burden_breaks),
            cluster_rows = TRUE,
            cluster_columns = FALSE,
            column_names_rot = 45
          )
        )
      )
    }

    module_burden_tbl <- gene_priority_tbl %>%
      filter(!is.na(module_label), module_label != "") %>%
      mutate(de_status = ifelse(gene_id_clean %in% unique(de_result$ensembl_id[de_result$direction != "ns"]), "DE_and_DAS", "DAS_only")) %>%
      group_by(module_label, de_status) %>%
      summarise(total_as_events = sum(significant_event_count), das_gene_count = n(), .groups = "drop")

    save_das_module_burden_plot(
      module_burden_tbl,
      primary = step10_integr_plot_path("15_27_DAS_module_burden_barplot.pdf"),
      width = 8.5,
      height = max(5, 0.7 * nrow(module_burden_tbl))
    )
  }
}
```

## 15.9 module-DEU / module-IS 与多证据模块汇总

```{r}
if (nrow(module_df_annotated) > 0 && nrow(module_trait_tbl) > 0 && nrow(as_gene_membership) > 0) {
  module_universe_ids <- unique(module_df_annotated$gene_id)
  deu_ids_in_universe <- unique(module_df_annotated$gene_id[module_df_annotated$ensembl_id %in% deu_sig_ids])
  is_ids_in_universe <- unique(module_df_annotated$gene_id[module_df_annotated$ensembl_id %in% isoform_sig_ids])

  if (length(deu_ids_in_universe) > 0) {
    module_deu_enrichment <- bind_rows(lapply(sort(unique(module_df_annotated$module_label)), function(one_module) {
      module_genes <- unique(module_df_annotated$gene_id[module_df_annotated$module_label == one_module])
      in_module_deu <- sum(module_genes %in% deu_ids_in_universe)
      in_module_non_deu <- length(module_genes) - in_module_deu
      out_module_deu <- length(deu_ids_in_universe) - in_module_deu
      out_module_non_deu <- length(module_universe_ids) - length(module_genes) - out_module_deu
      fisher_res <- fisher.test(matrix(c(in_module_deu, in_module_non_deu, out_module_deu, out_module_non_deu), nrow = 2), alternative = "greater")
      bg_ratio <- length(deu_ids_in_universe) / length(module_universe_ids)
      module_ratio <- if (length(module_genes) > 0) in_module_deu / length(module_genes) else 0
      data.frame(
        Module = one_module,
        module_size = length(module_genes),
        deu_gene_count = in_module_deu,
        deu_gene_ratio = module_ratio,
        background_ratio = bg_ratio,
        fold_enrichment = ifelse(bg_ratio > 0, module_ratio / bg_ratio, NA_real_),
        odds_ratio = unname(fisher_res$estimate),
        pvalue = fisher_res$p.value,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    })) %>%
      left_join(
        module_trait_tbl %>% dplyr::select(Module, module_trait_correlation = correlation, module_trait_pvalue = pvalue),
        by = "Module"
      ) %>%
      arrange(pvalue, desc(fold_enrichment))

    write.csv(module_deu_enrichment, step10_integr_table_path("15_50_Module_DEU_Enrichment.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

    module_deu_plot <- ggplot(module_deu_enrichment, aes(x = module_trait_correlation, y = reorder(Module, module_trait_correlation), size = deu_gene_count, color = -log10(pvalue + 1e-300))) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.85) +
      scale_color_heatmap_sequential() +
      labs(title = "模块-分组相关性与 DEU 富集整合", x = "Module-trait correlation", y = NULL, size = "DEU genes", color = "-log10(pvalue)") +
      theme_rnaseq_bw()
    save_plot_versions(
      module_deu_plot,
      primary = step10_integr_plot_path("15_51_Module_DEU_Enrichment_Bubble.pdf"),
      width = 8,
      height = max(4.5, 0.8 * nrow(module_deu_enrichment))
    )
  }

  if (length(is_ids_in_universe) > 0) {
    module_is_enrichment <- bind_rows(lapply(sort(unique(module_df_annotated$module_label)), function(one_module) {
      module_genes <- unique(module_df_annotated$gene_id[module_df_annotated$module_label == one_module])
      in_module_is <- sum(module_genes %in% is_ids_in_universe)
      in_module_non_is <- length(module_genes) - in_module_is
      out_module_is <- length(is_ids_in_universe) - in_module_is
      out_module_non_is <- length(module_universe_ids) - length(module_genes) - out_module_is
      fisher_res <- fisher.test(matrix(c(in_module_is, in_module_non_is, out_module_is, out_module_non_is), nrow = 2), alternative = "greater")
      bg_ratio <- length(is_ids_in_universe) / length(module_universe_ids)
      module_ratio <- if (length(module_genes) > 0) in_module_is / length(module_genes) else 0
      data.frame(
        Module = one_module,
        module_size = length(module_genes),
        is_gene_count = in_module_is,
        is_gene_ratio = module_ratio,
        background_ratio = bg_ratio,
        fold_enrichment = ifelse(bg_ratio > 0, module_ratio / bg_ratio, NA_real_),
        odds_ratio = unname(fisher_res$estimate),
        pvalue = fisher_res$p.value,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    })) %>%
      left_join(
        module_trait_tbl %>% dplyr::select(Module, module_trait_correlation = correlation, module_trait_pvalue = pvalue),
        by = "Module"
      ) %>%
      arrange(pvalue, desc(fold_enrichment))

    write.csv(module_is_enrichment, step10_integr_table_path("15_52_Module_IS_Enrichment.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

    module_is_plot <- ggplot(module_is_enrichment, aes(x = module_trait_correlation, y = reorder(Module, module_trait_correlation), size = is_gene_count, color = -log10(pvalue + 1e-300))) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.85) +
      scale_color_heatmap_sequential() +
      labs(title = "模块-分组相关性与 Isoform Switch 富集整合", x = "Module-trait correlation", y = NULL, size = "IS genes", color = "-log10(pvalue)") +
      theme_rnaseq_bw()
    save_plot_versions(
      module_is_plot,
      primary = step10_integr_plot_path("15_53_Module_IS_Enrichment_Bubble.pdf"),
      width = 8,
      height = max(4.5, 0.8 * nrow(module_is_enrichment))
    )
  }

  module_evidence_summary <- module_df_annotated %>%
    mutate(gene_id_clean = ensembl_id) %>%
    left_join(as_gene_membership, by = "gene_id_clean") %>%
    mutate(
      DE = dplyr::coalesce(DE, FALSE),
      DAS = dplyr::coalesce(DAS, FALSE),
      DEU = dplyr::coalesce(DEU, FALSE),
      IS = dplyr::coalesce(IS, FALSE)
    ) %>%
    group_by(module_label) %>%
    summarise(
      module_size = n(),
      de_genes = sum(DE, na.rm = TRUE),
      das_genes = sum(DAS, na.rm = TRUE),
      deu_genes = sum(DEU, na.rm = TRUE),
      is_genes = sum(IS, na.rm = TRUE),
      multi_evidence_genes = sum((DE + DAS + DEU + IS) >= 2, na.rm = TRUE),
      triple_support_genes = sum((DE + DAS + DEU + IS) >= 3, na.rm = TRUE),
      four_way_support_genes = sum((DE + DAS + DEU + IS) == 4, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    left_join(module_trait_tbl %>% dplyr::select(Module, module_trait_correlation = correlation, module_trait_pvalue = pvalue), by = c("module_label" = "Module")) %>%
    arrange(desc(multi_evidence_genes), desc(four_way_support_genes), desc(abs(module_trait_correlation)))

  write.csv(module_evidence_summary, step10_integr_table_path("15_54_Module_MultiEvidence_Summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

  module_evidence_long <- module_evidence_summary %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(de_genes, das_genes, deu_genes, is_genes, multi_evidence_genes, triple_support_genes, four_way_support_genes), names_to = "evidence_type", values_to = "gene_count")

  module_evidence_plot <- ggplot(module_evidence_long, aes(x = module_trait_correlation, y = reorder(module_label, module_trait_correlation), size = gene_count, color = evidence_type)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.85) +
    labs(title = "模块层面的 DE/DAS/DEU/IS 证据总览", x = "Module-trait correlation", y = NULL, size = "Gene count", color = "Evidence") +
    theme_rnaseq_bw()
  save_plot_versions(
    module_evidence_plot,
    primary = step10_integr_plot_path("15_55_Module_MultiEvidence_Bubble.pdf"),
    width = 9,
    height = max(5, 0.8 * nrow(module_evidence_summary))
  )

  module_evidence_heatmap_mat <- module_evidence_summary %>%
    dplyr::select(de_genes, das_genes, deu_genes, is_genes, multi_evidence_genes, triple_support_genes, four_way_support_genes, module_trait_correlation) %>%
    as.matrix()
  rownames(module_evidence_heatmap_mat) <- module_evidence_summary$module_label
  module_evidence_heatmap_scaled <- scale(module_evidence_heatmap_mat)
  module_evidence_heatmap_scaled[!is.finite(module_evidence_heatmap_scaled)] <- 0

  save_base_pdf_versions(
    primary = step10_integr_plot_path("15_56_Module_MultiEvidence_Heatmap.pdf"),
    width = 8,
    height = max(5, 0.5 * nrow(module_evidence_summary) + 2),
    expr = ComplexHeatmap::draw(
      ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(
        module_evidence_heatmap_scaled,
        name = "z-score",
        col = heatmap_diverging_col_fun(module_evidence_heatmap_scaled),
        cluster_rows = TRUE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_names_rot = 45
      )
    )
  )
}
```

## 15.10 splicing 状态缓存

```{r}
splicing_state <- list(
  as_gene_priority = as_gene_priority,
  as_gene_membership = as_gene_membership,
  dsfa_sig_ids = unique(stats::na.omit(dsfa_sig_ids)),
  deu_sig_ids = unique(stats::na.omit(deu_sig_ids)),
  isoform_sig_ids = unique(stats::na.omit(isoform_sig_ids)),
  apa_sig_ids = unique(stats::na.omit(apa_sig_ids)),
  der_sig_ids = unique(stats::na.omit(der_sig_ids)),
  top_as_candidates = top_as_candidates,
  dsfa_gene_burden = dsfa_gene_burden,
  apa_gene_summary_tbl = apa_gene_summary_tbl,
  der_gene_summary_tbl = der_gene_summary_tbl,
  generated_at = as.character(Sys.time())
)
saveRDS(splicing_state, cache_15_splicing_state_path)

splicing_manifest <- data.frame(
  key = c(
    "cache_path",
    "as_gene_priority_rows",
    "as_gene_membership_rows",
    "top_as_candidates_rows",
    "dsfa_sig_ids_n",
    "deu_sig_ids_n",
    "isoform_sig_ids_n",
    "apa_sig_ids_n",
    "der_sig_ids_n"
  ),
  value = c(
    cache_15_splicing_state_path,
    nrow(as_gene_priority),
    nrow(as_gene_membership),
    nrow(top_as_candidates),
    length(unique(stats::na.omit(dsfa_sig_ids))),
    length(unique(stats::na.omit(deu_sig_ids))),
    length(unique(stats::na.omit(isoform_sig_ids))),
    length(unique(stats::na.omit(apa_sig_ids))),
    length(unique(stats::na.omit(der_sig_ids)))
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
write.csv(splicing_manifest, step10_event_table_path("15_0_splicing_state_manifest.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```
